objective: Build a language-agnostic review/lock pipeline that supports multi-machine collaboration while keeping language rules independent.

tasks.title: Freeze universal schema and directory contract
actions: Publish shared schemas for surface_candidates, surface_review_queue, surface_locks, and effective resolution.
Document canonical-vs-runtime directory policy.
Define candidate_signature and stale lock rules.
acceptance: Schema fields are explicit and language-agnostic.
Runtime files are marked disposable; lock files marked canonical.

tasks.title: Migrate KO manual review outputs into canonical lock store
actions: Create content/source/ko/review/mapping/ structure.
Migrate existing override/lock data into surface_locks.jsonl + line_overrides/.
Backfill reviewer and timestamp metadata.
acceptance: No lock data remains only in runtime paths.

tasks.title: Integrate runtime review queue + effective resolution in KO pipeline
actions: Write runtime outputs under data/staging/runtime/.
Generate surface_review_queue based on new/changed/collision/stale logic.
Apply locks deterministically to produce mapping_accepted/mapping_conflicts.
acceptance: Re-run does not erase canonical lock files.
Only unresolved surfaces stay in review queue.

tasks.title: Add claim/event workflow for multi-machine reviewers
actions: Add review_claims format and validator.
Add append-only review_events format.
Add compile_locks command to build deterministic lock snapshot.
acceptance: Parallel reviewers can work without lock-file merge chaos.
Compiled lock output is deterministic across machines.

tasks.title: Scope KO processing to A1/A2/B1 and defer B2/C1
actions: Filter pipeline input to A1/A2/B1.
Ensure non-target levels are excluded from queue and gate metrics.
Document scope in staging contract.
acceptance: No B2/C1 rows in runtime accepted/conflicts while scope is active.

tasks.title: Introduce hard gates for review/lock integrity
actions: Add gate checks: coverage_locked_rate, unresolved_surface_count, stale_lock_count, collision_unresolved_count.
Fail CI on hard gate violations.
Publish machine-readable gate summary artifact.
acceptance: Injected stale/collision samples fail CI as expected.
Healthy KO baseline passes with deterministic output.

tasks.title: Generalize review/lock core for additional languages
actions: Define adapter interface: tokenizer output -> universal candidate schema.
Pilot one non-KO language with shared lock/queue engine.
Document language-onboarding checklist.
acceptance: Non-KO language can run review/lock flow without schema changes.
Language-specific rules stay in isolated language repo.
